g.text: Registered central slice of the pore network

text.tspan: Exact slice: =7; 225 nodes; 420 throats; line width maps registered initial radius .
Tested : uniform; surface area; small throat; current path; collector bias; registered strong-site draw.

text.style: font: 700 8px 'TeX Gyre Termes', serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Comparator domains are prescribed, not reconstructed from felt images

text.style: fill: #6d7378; font: 6.5px 'TeX Gyre Termes', serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Flat definition only: no deposit field, coverage map, blockage front or reconstructed felt morphology is shown.
